title: Po_core po_trace_event v1
description: PR-002 design contract (schema only, no runtime wiring). Defines the common event envelope for future Po_trace events carrying semantic_profile, viewer_feedback, and po_self_decision structures. Po_trace is not merely audit logging; it is the substrate Po_self reads to make future decisions. Every Po_self decision must be represented as trace. This envelope is distinct from (and does not replace) the existing runtime TraceEvent schema documented in docs/ENGINE_TRACE_CONTRACT.md. See docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_EVENT_V1.md.

event_type.$comment: PoSelfReconstructionPlanned is behaviorally emitted as of PR-006 (payload maps to reconstruction_plan_v1). PoSelfReconstructionApplied is behaviorally emitted as of PR-007 (payload summarizes reconstruction_patch_v1 proposals; means the plan was applied to the CONTROLLED EXECUTOR, not that content was rewritten -- content_rewrite_applied is always false). PoTraceBlockedRecorded/PoTraceBlockedRead (payload maps to po_trace_blocked_v1), PoSelfSeedlingEvaluated (payload maps to po_self_seedling_v1), and SemanticJumpTensorComputed/SemanticJumpPlanned (payload maps to semantic_jump_tensor_v1 / semantic_jump_plan_v1) are behaviorally emitted as of PR-014, feature-flagged and seed-level only -- see docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_BLOCKED_CONTRACT_V1.md, docs/contracts/PO_SELF_SEEDLING_CONTRACT_V1.md, docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_JUMP_TENSOR_CONTRACT_V1.md. PoTraceBlockedReactivationEvaluated/PoTraceBlockedReactivationPlanned (payload maps to po_trace_reactivation_plan_v1) are behaviorally emitted as of PR-015, feature-flagged and planning-only -- no reactivation is ever executed; see docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_REACTIVATION_PLAN_V1.md. PoTraceBlockedReactivationProposed (payload maps to po_trace_reactivation_proposal_v1) is behaviorally emitted as of PR-016, feature-flagged and proposal-only -- means a PoTraceReactivationPlan was applied to the CONTROLLED PROPOSAL EXECUTOR, not that any blocked trace was reactivated; reactivation_executed/content_rewrite_applied/state_mutation_applied/safety_bypass_applied are always false; see docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_REACTIVATION_PROPOSAL_V1.md. PoTraceBlockedReactivated (actual reactivation execution) is intentionally NOT declared here -- it remains a reserved future controlled mode. See docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_EVENT_V1.md. The other event types remain as declared.

payload.description: Event-specific body. additionalProperties is intentionally true at the envelope level because payload shape depends on event_type; payload MUST validate against the corresponding event-specific contract when one exists (see docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_EVENT_V1.md mapping table).
